name: 偷聽揭露鉤子
description: 女主在試婚紗時偷聽到未婚夫和小三的對話，得知自己被利用和嘲笑。這一場景瞬間翻轉觀眾情緒，從期待婚禮轉為憤怒和期待復仇。

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: She's got a huge ego. Always putting on the show... I bet she got that wedding dress with an online loan or something. I can't stand people like her. too broke to act fancy but still try so hard. / Because she saved my grandma. My grandma made me get engaged to her. But now my grandma is gone. I can finally kick her out of my life.
